title: ayenia scabrida
intro: Ayenia scabrida, also known as the rough ayenia, is a plant species in the family Malpighiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Ayenia scabrida include its potential to treat various ailments, including wounds, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Ayenia scabrida can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal benefits and promote overall well-being.
